integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenProject web interface to make changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual OpenProject application.

integrity.description: Verify the results are not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM text to fake the statuses, assignees, or comments.
